positive: A symmetrical, stylized celestial forest scene, featuring bioluminescent flora and intertwined root systems on a dark midnight backdrop. The central composition must highlight giant, stylized luminous mushrooms and meandering glowing vines, creating a strong, clean silhouette against deep indigo and violet gradients. Use linework illustration style combined with ethereal watercolor washes. The aesthetic should be highly detailed yet clean, emphasizing crisp edges, high contrast, and a vibrant, otherworldly glow. Ideal for repeat print pattern or central apparel graphic. Cinematic, mystical, maximalist.
negative: blurry, text, watermark, signature, artifact, grain, low detail, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noisy, cartoon, photograph, logo, trademark
